Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.
Video.title: Sleep Of The Just

Video.summary: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.
Video.title: The Witches Of Eastbridge

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.
Video.title: Family Business

Video.summary: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.
Video.title: The Frame

Video.summary: Following the death of his gangster son in a police shootout, mobster Tommy Colette vows to kill Tony Scali himself.
Video.title: Out Of Business

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: A bizarre murder is a biochemist's effort to conceal the killing of a woman's husband in order to win her.
Video.title: Me, Myself & Die

Video.summary: One of Tony's men, Danny Nolan, goes ballistic when Joe Lund, the gun-wielding ex-husband of the woman Dan's been seeing, takes her hostage.
Video.title: The Ides Of March

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a string of robberies, pursue the thieves, and shoot a man who may be innocent.
Video.title: Shoot To Kill

Video.summary: Loyalties are tested when Hunter jeopardizes a case prosecuted by the Assistant DA, whom McCall loves.
Video.title: Presumed Guilty

Video.summary: Hunter confronts the entire police department to defend the actions of a Chinese-American policewoman.
Video.title: Honorable Profession

Video.summary: When Hunter refuses to reveal an informant to a Grand Jury, he is sent to jail, as a convicted murder is freed
Video.title: Informant

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow the trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a racehorse.
Video.title: Blood Line

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall cope with the double and triple-crossing of a criminal who once saved Hunter's life.
Video.title: Payback

Video.summary: Mysterious recordings accusing a powerful company of dumping toxic waste seem like a prank, until the killings
Video.title: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Image.alt: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 2

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper, wanted in San Diego for assaulting an officer and resisting arrest.
Video.title: Bonnie And Claire

Video.summary: After tailing robber Nicky Griffin for two years, Bobby and Cheyenne are able to link the man and his proficient get-away drivers to the stock car racing circuit through his most recent heist of a local bank
Video.title: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Image.alt: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Video.summary: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines
Video.title: Windy City Blues
